videos.title: Did we find the ULTIMATE family camping trailer?!
videos.description:
In this episode our test of the Imperial Outdoors X195 continues and we are constantly having our minds blown with its amenities and comforts! Obviously, the size is the only challenge but wow... is it ever a worthy trade for a family experience. Ride along as we take this home on wheels a bit deeper into the Tennessee mountains to a peaceful riverside stream I've been keeping in my stash of waypoints. Good food, peaceful camping, and beautiful travels made this trip one for the books!

Trailer

videos.title: Moab Adventure Trail Day 2 - The most technical day!
videos.description:
I created a 5 day overlanding loop around Moab to help people experience more of what Moab has to offer. This is day 2 that goes on the most technical trails of the route including Rose Garden Hill.
